name: Whisper the Wolf | Sonic the Hedgehog (IDW)
description:
TW=Contains themes of: Grief, Suicide Attempt... Doomed Yuri anyone?

*****

"P-please... get out of my room and let me end it in peace FOR CRYING OUT LOUD! I-i lost everyone i used to love... Slinger, Claire, Smithy... and now Tangle... i-i can't do this anymore... i have no hope left..."

*****

(Metal Virus, most specifically, an HC of mine about the continuation of Post-Issue #24)

The Metal Virus had left its obvious marks to the inhabitants of Mobius: Zombots everywhere, Panic and for Sonic's friends? All of the above, plus loss and depression: Sonic was completely drained after helping Silver to get rid of the virus off the planet for good and Tails, Knuckles and Amy were still healthy, but equally traumatized... But as for the others? Rouge and Omega were shaken by the loss of Shadow against the infected, Cream was also half infected but got into a coma with Gemerl guarding over her, Espio hasn't talked ever since Vector sacrificed himself to save them from a corrupted Charmy and Eggman had already moved on to the next plan. But the one who got hit from it the worst?

Whisper

Because, what could possibly happen if you take a mercenary sniper wolf, who has already endured years of Trauma from losing her entire squad from an ambush set up by her rogue teammate, get her in an apocalyptic scenario and make her watch the zombification of the only person who has dared to bring her out of her shell and fight by her side? That's right! You get a mercenary sniper wolf who no longer wants to live anymore! Huzzah!

Jokes aside, After witnessing Tangle, her only good friend after Silver and lover, getting turned into a mindless Zombie and then witnessing her and all off the other fully infected Mobians being turned into a massive goo of metal and then thrown in the sun by Super Sonic and Super Silver, felt like having a beast lurking over an old wound and then reopening it only to worsen it and amplify the infection. Ever since Sonic and the others were trying to go back to their ordinarry life, although it was hard considering at least 3/4 of the population has been wiped out, she was showing herself to the others way less and hadn't spoken a word since her desperate cries from when she hopelessly tried to reach for Tangle... as Amy held her off and the Wisps dragged her inside the ship to go away from Spiral Hill. To make matters worse, she's had suicidal thoughts running through her head as the day passed, and they were getting worse by even causing her to get insomniac and insane... Therefore, one day, while everyone else was busy checking stuff to start restoring the town, she decided it was time to finally reach Tangle and the 1st Diamond Cutters... So she loaded a Cyan Wisp in her Wispon and locked herself in her room...

*****

istg bro, everyone was catching strays in the Metal Virus saga 😭😭😭. Like holy hell: if you read it you would've lowkey felt hopeless too.

anyways, in this HC, when Sonic and Silver banish the Virus from the Earth, the fully infected don't get cured, but they rather turn into a massive pile of metal goo and get thrown into the sun. The half infected, Sonic and Cream for example, could only feel extremely drained from their energy and forced to reast for at least a week.

<
creator: Nico il Sardo
